item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
What's New

  • License activation now talks directly to Dodo Payments, removing the previous payment bridge
  • New onboarding step for purchasing or activating a license on first launch
  • Optimize tasks now require an active license, matching Clean and Uninstall
  • Stronger uninstall safety: refuses to touch Documents, Desktop, Downloads, Pictures, Movies, and Music
  • Stable device fingerprint across app launches even when system identifiers are unavailable
  • Faster Analyze rendering on directories with many entries
  • Refund window updated to 14 days, in line with EU consumer law
